interpretation.HBB: Q2b MPRA scores indistinguishable from Q4 benign (p=0.41). MPRA blind to architecture-driven variants.
interpretation.TERT: No Q2b variants in 258bp MPRA window. All 10 matched variants are Q4 benign.
interpretation.LDLR: No Q2b variants in 317bp MPRA window. All 25 matched variants are Q4 benign.
interpretation.overall: Cross-locus MPRA overlay confirms: architecture-driven (Q2b) variants are systematically invisible to promoter-scale MPRA assays. This is consistent with the taxonomy prediction that Class B pathogenicity operates through 3D chromatin structure, not local regulatory activity.
